'''Riwwel''' was an Imperial [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] during the first [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. He led the forces that were tasked with quelling the resistance movement on the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] world of [[Acherin]]. Both sides clashed for nearly a year, until the Imperials finally proved to be too powerful for the resistance. Their leader, [[Toma (resistance leader)|Toma]], announced their surrender, however, Riwwel felt that surrender wasn't enough considering for the number of Imperial lives taken in the battle. He ordered the annihilation of the resistance, through the bombing of their base, the ancient city of [[Eluthan]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The Last of the Jedi: Dark Warning]]'' {{1st}}
